name: gradeCalculation
invariants: output.ok === false || (Array.isArray(output.result.students) && output.result.students.every(s => Number.isFinite(s.weightedPct) && typeof s.letterGrade === 'string'))
_note: education.gradeCalculation is a LENS_ACTIONS handler (server/domains/education.js, registerLensAction('education','gradeCalculation',...)), NOT a runMacro/MACROS macro — reached via /api/lens/run, 3-arg handler(ctx, virtualArtifact, input) with virtualArtifact.data === input (the dispatch peelRedundantArtifactWrapper unwraps the EducationActionPanel's {artifact:{data}} envelope to a single layer). DETERMINISTIC pure compute (no LLM, no network, no STATE). Returns a CLASS report — studentsGraded, classStats.{average,median,high,low}, students[].{studentId,name,weightedPct,letterGrade,categoryBreakdown}. The component + inline page Domain-Actions panel both render these EXACT fields. POISON: score/maxScore/weight coerced via eduFinite — non-finite (Infinity/NaN/'abc') collapse to a finite fallback (0 / 100 / 0) so every weightedPct + classStat stays FINITE; a non-array students throws inside the map and is caught → {ok:false,error:'handler_error'} (never crashes). Pinned by server/tests/education-lens-macros.test.js.
